name: Wallet Denomination Ledger
description: Append-only transaction log per wallet, per denomination. Tracks all movements: TRANSFER in/out, MINT received, BURN removed, HOLD reserved, SETTLE debit. Summed per denom = current balance. Immutable for audit + reconciliation.
input: walletId, denom: Denomination, type: TransactionType, amount, note
output: { txId, walletId, denom, type, amount, balance, timestamp }
author: Tiranyx
